mapper.select: /* 메뉴 단건 조회 menuManage.selectMenuById */ SELECT MENU_ID AS menuId , MENU_NAME AS menuName , PARN_MENU_ID AS parnMenuId , MENU_LEVEL AS menuLevel , MENU_PATH AS menuPath , IS_LEAF AS isLeaf , SRC_PATH AS srcPath , ICON AS icon , SORT_ORD AS sortOrd , USE_YN AS useYn , DESCRIPTION AS description FROM TB_MENU WHERE MENU_ID = #{menuId}
